violations.text: Cold hold drawers located in the sandwich prep area was not in good repair (observed bottom drawers not closing tightly). New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the sandwich prep units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC discarded ice and took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Various items were observed held between 44-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed items in walk-in for active cooling and discarded items based on time/temp. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC refilled sani buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. PIC notified and corrected. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Cold hold drawers located in the sandwich prep area was not in good repair (observed bottom drawers not closing tightly). New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Refrigerator doors gaskets ([3] 1 door lowboys and cold drawers at prep unit) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the decorating table have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Light in walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
